addProducts.title: Add Products

removeProducts.title: Remove Products

validation.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
validation.dateMustBeFuture: Date must be in the future

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Manage your preferences and account settings

language.title: Language
language.description: Choose your preferred language for the interface

storeInformation.title: Store Information
storeInformation.description: Manage your store's basic information and settings
storeInformation.permissionError: You don't have permission to view store settings.

users.title: Team Management
users.description: Invite new team members to your store and manage their roles and permissions.
users.name: Name
users.noUsersMessage: This store doesn't have any users yet.

errors.mustHaveOwner: There must always be at least one owner.

removeUser.title: Remove User from Store
removeUser.description: This will permanently remove {name} from {store}. They will lose all access to this store, lose their current role and permissions, and need to be re-invited if you want them back. Their user account will remain active for other stores.

resetPin.title: Reset PIN for {name}
resetPin.description: This will generate a new PIN and send it to the employee by email. Their current PIN will no longer work.

unlockPin.title: Unlock PIN for {name}
unlockPin.description: This will immediately unlock the employee's PIN and reset their failed attempts counter.
unlockPin.lockedMessage: The account is currently locked due to failed PIN attempts

removeDialog.title: Remove User from Store
removeDialog.description: Are you sure you want to remove {name} from this store? This will deactivate their access but won't delete their account.

account.title: Account Information
account.description: Manage your account settings and preferences.

profile.title: Profile Information
profile.emailNotice: Email cannot be changed. Contact support if needed.

validation.nameTooLong: Full name must be less than 100 characters
validation.usernameRequired: Username must be at least 2 characters
validation.usernameTooLong: Username must be less than 50 characters
validation.usernameInvalid: Username can only contain letters, numbers, and underscores

phone.title: Phone Number
phone.label: Phone Number
phone.description: Enter your phone number with country code (optional)
phone.addNotice: Add a phone number for account security and notifications
phone.invalidPhone: Please enter a valid phone number

language.title: Language Preference
language.description: Choose your preferred language for the interface

security.notice: This is your personal account. You can change your password in the login page.

emptyState.title: No batches found
emptyState.description: Try adjusting your search or filters.

addEmployee.title: Add New Employee
addEmployee.description: Create a new employee account with PIN authentication. Login credentials will be sent by email.

form.emailNote: Use test@example.com for testing. Real emails will receive login credentials.
form.usernameNote: Employee will use this username to log in

preview.loginNote: The employee can log in using the "Employee" tab with their username and PIN

success.title: Employee Created Successfully!
success.description: {name} has been added to your store. Save these credentials and share them with the employee.

nextSteps.title: Next Steps:
nextSteps.loginTab: • The employee can log in using the "Employee" tab on the login page
nextSteps.resetPin: • The PIN can be reset at any time from the team management page
nextSteps.permissions: • The employee can scan products and manage basic inventory

errors.fillFields: Please fill in all required fields
errors.usernameTaken: Username is already taken. Please choose a different one.

toast.created: Employee created successfully using server API!
toast.emailSkipped: Employee created! Email skipped for test address.
